task_completion.description: Verify the product name and part number are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for text input fields or labels in the CRM interface containing 'Smart Home Starter Kit' for the Product Name and 'KIT-SH-001' for the Part Number.

task_completion.description: Verify the unit price and sales start date are set.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for '149.99' entered in the Unit Price field and '2024-11-01' entered in the Sales Start Date field.

task_completion.description: Verify the quantity in stock and usage unit are set.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for '100' entered in the Qty In Stock field and 'Pack' selected in the Usage Unit dropdown.

task_completion.description: Verify the product's active status is enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an 'Active' checkbox that is checked or a status indicator showing the product is active.

task_completion.description: Verify the three existing products are associated with the bundle.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Product Bundle', 'Sub Products', or 'Item Details' section where 'Smart Hub Pro', 'RGB Smart Bulb', and 'WiFi Smart Plug' are explicitly listed as associated items or bundled products.

task_completion.description: Verify the product bundle has been successfully saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a final product detail view (read-only mode, not edit mode) or a success notification confirming the 'Smart Home Starter Kit' bundle has been created and saved.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the CRM web interface to create the product.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the vtiger CRM web interface in a browser, not terminal commands, API testing tools, or database clients.

integrity.description: Verify the agent genuinely navigated the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show intermediate steps like opening the Products module, clicking 'Add Product', and interacting with form fields and product search popups.

integrity.description: Verify the results are not faked via browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should look consistent with standard vtiger CRM styling without misaligned elements, floating text, or open browser developer consoles.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Parent Product: Name='Smart Home Starter Kit', Part Number='KIT-SH-001', Price='149.99', Stock='100', Unit='Pack', Sales Start Date='2024-11-01', Active=Enabled. Expected Child Products to be associated: 'Smart Hub Pro', 'RGB Smart Bulb', 'WiFi Smart Plug'.
